summary: REQ-3 is fully implemented. The ContactFooter component has been updated with realistic-looking contact details (email: contact@luminary.io, phone: +1 (415) 823-5670, address: 350 Market St, Suite 900, San Francisco, CA 94105), clearly labeled with icons in a dedicated contact info panel, and the dark charcoal + amber visual theme is preserved. No files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx were modified.
